description: A dark graphic with the heading 'UAP FILES RELEASE' in white block letters and a caption stating it is a NASA photograph from the Apollo 12 landing site featuring a highlighted area of interest above the horizon. Below is a teal-tinted lunar-surface photo showing an astronaut's shadow, with a yellow box magnifying a small bluish smudge near the horizon. A White House logo and label appear at the bottom.
notable_text: UAP FILES RELEASE; NASA Photograph from the landing site of Apollo 12; The WHITE HOUSE
